commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway startup helper that auto-installs and enables `@openclaw/codex` for configured OpenAI/OpenAI Codex model refs, wires it into gateway plugin bootstrap, and adds focused mocked tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main requires the codex harness for official OpenAI/OpenAI Codex refs but only installs it through onboarding, and the PR's remaining failures follow from the source paths for explicit plugin policy and deferred runtime loading with the raw activation source.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because real behavior proof is missing and the remaining blockers require patch changes before normal review can continue.

target.title: fix(gateway): install codex runtime plugin at startup when openai models are configured
